description: Wire line that cannot be parsed as JSON at all. Server must respond with a JSON-RPC Parse Error (code -32700). The response id may be null since no id can be extracted from malformed input.

input.wire_line: this is not valid json at all
input.notes: Wire line is intentionally unparseable. Append '\n' via buildStdioLine() before writing to stdin.

error_code_reference.-32700: Parse error — server received text that is not valid JSON
